title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 24 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 24 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 24 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 24/11/2025
Today, Dce experienced a strong, fluctuating upward trend, with the main contract I2601 closing at 790.5 yuan, a slight increaseof 0.44% compared to the previous trading day. Traders demonstrated moderate enthusiasm in ofloading goods, while steel mills adopted a cautious wait-and-see approach, showing limited willingness to procure. Overall, market trading activity remained subdued.
